metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace for mck-scaffold. Install directly with: /plugin marketplace add github:MCKRUZ/mck-scaffold

plugins.name: mck-scaffold
plugins.description: Interview-driven project scaffolder for Claude Code. Routes new projects to the right Spec-Driven Development methodology (Superpowers, Spec-Kit, MUSUBI, OpenSpec, or lean) based on Piskala's three-level rigor taxonomy and Wasowski's four decision contexts.
